title: justicia engleriana
intro: Justicia engleriana, also known as the Mexican honeysuckle or Mexican jasmine, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Acanthaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Justicia engleriana is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and possessing antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
